content: Next.js MDX blog stack: next-mdx-remote or @next/mdx for compilation, rehype-slug for heading IDs, rehype-autolink-headings for deep-linkable section anchors, rehype-highlight or Shiki for syntax highlighting (server-side, no client JS cost), remark-gfm for tables/strikethrough/task lists, rehype-extract-toc or custom heading walk for table of contents, reading-time package for estimated read duration.
